summary: Full e2e testing of Jefferson's Grill restaurant website. All 8 backend API tests passed. Frontend loaded correctly with hero, sticky navbar, menu tabs (8), reviews (4), gallery, reservation form with calendar/toast, and contact form with toast.

issues: Navbar has 'VISIT' section instead of 'Contact' - data-testid is nav-visit, not nav-contact as specified in test spec. Minor naming discrepancy only.

action_items: Minor: data-testid for contact/visit nav link is 'nav-visit', spec expected 'nav-contact'. Not a functional issue, just naming. E1 can update if needed.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and well-structured. All endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id via projection.
Guests validation range is 1-30 (not 1-40 as mentioned in spec comments, but spec says '0 or 40 returns 400' which is correctly handled).
CORSMiddleware is added AFTER include_router - works fine in FastAPI but conventionally added first.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed reservations and contact messages during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend 8/8 tests pass. Frontend: hero, navbar, menu tabs (RIBS/BRISKET/PULLED PORK/CHICKEN/SANDWICHES/SIDES/DESSERTS/DRINKS), reviews (4 cards with star ratings), gallery, reservation form (calendar popover, time select, guests select, toast success), contact form (toast success). The only minor note: nav link for contact/visit section uses data-testid='nav-visit' not 'nav-contact'.
